languages.text: "Прекрасная идея, сенешаль, отправь весточку своему капитану. Пусть Погонщиц заманивают на пристреленные с орбиты позиции и уничтожают их лэнс-батареями".

traits.locale_text: "Прекрасная идея, сенешаль, отправь весточку своему капитану. Пусть Погонщиц заманивают на пристреленные с орбиты позиции и уничтожают их лэнс-батареями".

languages.text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."
languages.original_text: "Прекрасная идея, сенешаль, отправь весточку своему капитану. Пусть Погонщиц заманивают на пристреленные с орбиты позиции и уничтожают их лэнс-батареями".

traits.locale_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers onto pre-targeted orbital positions and annihilate them with lance batteries."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers onto pre-targeted orbital positions and annihilate them with lance batteries."
"An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

languages.text: 「いい考えだね、執事。放牧民を軌道上から攻撃できる位置に誘い込み、ランス砲で撃破しよう」
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Have the Drovers lured into positions that can be fired upon from orbit and destroy them with our lance battery."

traits.locale_text: 「いい考えだね、執事。放牧民を軌道上から攻撃できる位置に誘い込み、ランス砲で撃破しよう」

languages.text: «Una idea excelente, Senescal. Informe a su capitán. Atraigan a los Pastores a las posiciones seleccionadas y los aniquilaremos desde la órbita con baterías de lanzas».
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

traits.locale_text: «Una idea excelente, Senescal. Informe a su capitán. Atraigan a los Pastores a las posiciones seleccionadas y los aniquilaremos desde la órbita con baterías de lanzas».

languages.text: “好主意，总领。传讯给那位舰长，将拒生花诱至预设打击位置，再从轨道上用光矛把它们彻底歼灭。”
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

traits.locale_text: “好主意，总领。传讯给那位舰长，将拒生花诱至预设打击位置，再从轨道上用光矛把它们彻底歼灭。”

languages.text: "Eine ausgezeichnete Idee, Truchsess. Informiert den Captain. Lockt die Treiber zu vorbereiteten Positionen und löscht sie mit Lanzenbatterien aus dem Orbit aus."
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

traits.locale_text: "Eine ausgezeichnete Idee, Truchsess. Informiert den Captain. Lockt die Treiber zu vorbereiteten Positionen und löscht sie mit Lanzenbatterien aus dem Orbit aus."

languages.text: "Mükemmel bir fikir Seneşal. Kaptana haber gönder. Çobanları önceden ayarlanmış pozisyonlara çekin ve onları yörüngeden mızrak bataryalarıyla yok edin."
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

traits.locale_text: "Mükemmel bir fikir Seneşal. Kaptana haber gönder. Çobanları önceden ayarlanmış pozisyonlara çekin ve onları yörüngeden mızrak bataryalarıyla yok edin."

languages.text: « Excellente idée. Faites parvenir un message à votre capitaine. Attirez les Chasseurs vers des points stratégiques où nos batteries de lances pourront les anéantir depuis l'espace. »
languages.original_text: "An excellent idea, Seneschal. Send word to your captain. Lure the Drovers to pre-arranged positions and annihilate them from orbit with lance batteries."

traits.locale_text: « Excellente idée. Faites parvenir un message à votre capitaine. Attirez les Chasseurs vers des points stratégiques où nos batteries de lances pourront les anéantir depuis l'espace. »
